name: ttrpg-session-manager
description: Manage session audio, track combat &  access campaign notes in one App.

scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production concurrently "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"
scripts.start:server: cd server && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm start
scripts.start:client: cd client && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run preview
scripts.dev:all: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run dev:server:watch" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: cd server && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev
scripts.dev:server:watch: cd server && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev:watch
scripts.dev:client: cd client && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev
scripts.build:all: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build:shared && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:client: cd client && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build
scripts.build:server: cd server && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:server && npm run install:client
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:client && npm run lint:server
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:client -- --fix && npm run lint:server -- --fix

author: Tom zayev
